_instructions.description: Maps generated doc filenames to Confluence page IDs.
how_to_get_page_id: 1. Open the Confluence page in your browser
2. Click the '...' menu (top right) → Page Information
3. The page ID appears in the URL: /pages/<PAGE_ID>/info
OR: Use the create_page command to create pages automatically:
_instructions.note: Remove the _instructions key before running the publisher
